name: Bearnaise Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon finely chopped shallots or scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white wine, chopped shallots, and chopped tarragon in a saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat until the wine has reduced to a glaze.
3. Remove from heat and combine with the egg yolks and salt using a blender.
4. Heat the butter until it is bubbling hot.
5. Turn off the blender quickly, then turn it back on.
6. Gradually pour the melted butter into the mixture in a steady stream, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
7. Optionally, fold in additional chopped tarragon or parsley for garnish.
8. Serve over broiled beef, fish, or eggs.
